composition.Programmer 1:
Implement the backend code in app.py
- Develop the main backend Python file using Flask.
- The website should be accessible via local port 5000.
- The first page should be accessible at route '/' (Dashboard page).
- Implement routing for all nine pages, ensuring each route corresponds to the frontend templates.
- Handle all file read/write operations on the local text files in the 'data' directory, starting from the first line, using plain text without encryption.
- Manage application logic for user sessions, data loading, and updates for users, menu, reservations, waitlist, and reviews.
- Frontend templates to be supported  dashboard.html, menu.html, dish_details.html, make_reservation.html, my_reservations.html, waitlist.html, my_reviews.html, write_review.html, profile.html.
composition.Programmer 2:
Develop all frontend HTML templates in the templates/ directory
- Complete the frontend code for all nine pages as per the detailed page designs.
- Ensure all navigation buttons and links use Flask route URLs, not direct HTML file names.
- Implement the specified page elements with correct IDs and types.
- Pages to implement  dashboard.html, menu.html, dish_details.html, make_reservation.html, my_reservations.html, waitlist.html, my_reviews.html, write_review.html, profile.html.
